3012.issue: [S3012] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" is not defined. Consider adding it for automated releases.

3014.issue: [S3014] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should declare "needs: check-and-lint" to run after linting.

3020.issue: [E3020] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses node.js 20 which is below the minimum required version 22. Please update to node.js 24.

3032.issue: [W3032] Release 2.2.4 from [io-package.json](https://github.com/ka-vaNu/ioBroker.blebox/blob/master/io-package.json)/package.json has not yet been tagged. Tagging releases is required.

3035.issue: [S3035] No workflow run for "test-and-release.yml" triggered by tag "v2.2.3" was found for npm latest release 2.2.3. Workflow logs might be deleted already.

4038.issue: [S4038] .vscode/settings.json file missing "json.schemas" property. Add schema definitions for better IntelliSense support.

5039.issue: [W5039] "admin/words.js" found but not referenced anywhere. File seems to be outdated, please consider removing it.

5047.issue: [W5047] "admin/style.css" is most likely outdated since jsonConfig is used. Please consider removing it.

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("npm") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8913.issue: [S8913] No automerge workflow for dependabot PRs found. Consider setting up automerging by adding ".github/workflows/automerge-dependabot.yml".

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8916.issue: [W8916] Dependabot configuration "/.github/dependabot.yml" has no entry with "package-ecosystem: github-actions". Please add one.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0036.issue: [E0036] @iobroker/testing 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.2 is required as minimum,  5.2.2 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/ka-vaNu/ioBroker.blebox/blob/master/package.json)

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/ka-vaNu/ioBroker.blebox/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^24.9.1" at [package.json](https://github.com/ka-vaNu/ioBroker.blebox/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
